summary: Adjusted the opening to start from Nita's concrete action with the Claude card instead of repeating the adjacent chapter's apartment-sensory entry pattern, and tightened the closing terminology to hand off more directly into the next chapter's site-readiness setup.
edits: Reframed the opening around Nita retrieving and replacing the composure card while preserving the same delivery-package and Leela-absence information.
Kept the existing entry continuity from Chapter 14's fruit basket, linen spray, and public-visibility aftermath.
Changed the final line's wording from generic showcase bullets to site-readiness bullet points to sharpen the bridge into Chapter 16.
